selected_sections.title: Character System
selected_sections.prompt: Stats (Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, etc.); Classes/roles; Leveling system; Skill trees
selected_sections.answer: Single playable hero with only core combat stats for the prototype: HP and attack. No class split, no leveling tree, no long-term progression.

selected_sections.title: World and Exploration
selected_sections.prompt: Map structure (open world, hub-based, linear); Towns and safe zones; Dungeons and combat zones; Fast travel system
selected_sections.answer: One compact map scene for short exploration with movement, encounter trigger, and clear return flow after battle.

selected_sections.title: Combat System
selected_sections.prompt: Combat style (real-time, turn-based, tactical); Ability system; Magic/skill system; Status effects
selected_sections.answer: Small-scale RPG combat loop with direct damage exchange, visible HP changes, and explicit win or fail resolution.

gameplay_flow.question: 使用随机遇怪、地图撞怪，还是二者都支持？
gameplay_flow.answer: Support both map collision encounter and light random encounter hints, with map collision as the main visible trigger.

gameplay_flow.question: 战斗是回合制指令，还是即时碰撞/自动战斗？
gameplay_flow.answer: Use a simple turn-based combat command flow with at least Attack as the primary action.

gameplay_flow.question: 胜利后回到地图，还是进入结算后结束 prototype？
gameplay_flow.answer: After victory, return to the map so the player can immediately feel the loop is connected.

gameplay_flow.question: 玩家失败后是直接 Game Over、Retry 当前战斗，还是回到地图？
gameplay_flow.answer: After failure, allow retry so the prototype can be validated quickly without restarting the whole project.

gameplay_flow.question: 是否需要战后奖励或肉鸽三选一来验证流派感？
gameplay_flow.answer: Skip post-battle roguelike reward for the minimum version unless later iteration specifically asks for it.

prototype_scene_ui.question: 战斗场景需要哪些 UI：HP、指令按钮、战斗日志、技能栏？
prototype_scene_ui.answer: Battle scene should show player HP, enemy HP, one Attack action, and a short battle log.

prototype_scene_ui.question: 地图场景需要哪些 UI：HP、任务提示、小地图、遇怪提示？
prototype_scene_ui.answer: Map scene should show player HP, movement hint, and a clear encounter or objective hint.

prototype_scene_ui.question: 失败后是直接 Game Over，还是允许 Retry？
结算 UI 需要哪些按钮：Continue、Retry、Back to Map、End Prototype？
prototype_scene_ui.answer: Result UI should provide Continue or Back to Map, plus Retry on failure.

prototype_scene_ui.question: 是否需要保留调试 UI 帮助快速验证 prototype？
prototype_scene_ui.answer: Keep a small debug text area visible if it helps verify encounter and battle state quickly.

default_route: 遇敌方式：地图撞怪更直观；随机遇怪更接近传统 RPG。如果时间允许，二者都可支持。
战斗方式：默认回合制指令；如果想验证被动流派或肉鸽构筑，可用自动战斗。
地图规模：一个小房间、一条短路径或 12x12 网格即可。
怪物数量：最小版 1 个；增强版可用小怪 -> 精英 -> boss 短流程。
属性：最小版只需 HP / Attack；增强版可加 Defense / Crit / Passive。
default_ui: Player HP：显示玩家当前 HP。
Input Hint：显示 `WASD Move` 或中文操作提示。
Quest / Goal Hint：显示极简目标，如「找到敌人」或「击败 boss」。
Encounter Hint / Progress：显示遇敌状态、遇敌概率或接近敌人提示。
Optional Reward Hint：如果有肉鸽奖励或宝箱，显示奖励触发信息。
Optional Debug Text：可显示坐标、当前格子、遇敌状态，只用于 prototype 调试。
Player HP / Enemy HP：必须可见。
Actor Presentation：至少有玩家和敌人的代替形象或 sprite。
Command Panel：如果是指令战斗，至少包含 `Attack`。
Auto Battle State：如果是自动战斗，显示当前回合、战斗演算状态和关键被动触发。
Battle Log：显示最近行动反馈。
Result Panel：显示 Victory / Defeat / Game Over。
Continue / Retry / End Prototype：结算后至少有一个明确下一步操作。

manifest.label: Default RPG Template
manifest.description: Neutral reusable RPG prototype template metadata for the repo-local prototype lane.

prototype_core.core_player_fantasy: 成长的不确定性和可选择性，是否能过boss
prototype_core.minimum_playable_loop: 地图移动，概率撞怪，打赢怪物，选择成长
prototype_core.game_feature: （1.地图场景用wsad自由连续移动；2.地图场景有宝箱，移动上去可以选择奖励3选1；3.地图场景概率撞怪进入战斗场景；4.战斗场景由玩家先手进行回合制的自动攻击，显示战斗日志；5.战斗胜利选择奖励3选1；6.选择后回到地图场景；7.打赢15场战斗赢得游戏胜利。）
prototype_core.core_gameplay_loop: （1.地图场景玩家可以自由移动；2.地图场景有宝箱，移动上去可以选择奖励3选1；3.地图场景概率撞怪进入战斗场景；4.战斗场景由玩家先手进行回合制的自动攻击；5.战斗胜利选择奖励3选1；6.选择后回到地图场景；7.打赢15场战斗赢得游戏胜利。）
prototype_core.win_fail_conditions: （打赢15场战斗赢得游戏胜利；任一战斗失败就游戏失败）
